source_rationale: KRT17 is a basal cytokeratin characteristic of aberrant basaloid cells in fibrotic lung disease
KRT7 is a simple epithelial keratin marking the aberrant epithelial identity of basaloid cells
KRT8 is a luminal cytokeratin co-expressed with KRT17 in aberrant basaloid cells, distinguishing them from normal basal cells
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase associated with IPF pathology and aberrant basaloid cell activity
CDH1 (E-cadherin) marks the epithelial character of aberrant basaloid cells
KRT19 is a simple epithelial keratin expressed in aberrant basaloid cells reflecting their mixed basal-luminal phenotype
GPRC5A is a retinoic acid-induced receptor enriched in lung epithelial cells including aberrant basaloid populations
FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein highly specific to alveolar macrophages reflecting their lipid-rich environment
MARCO is a scavenger receptor characteristic of alveolar macrophages involved in pathogen clearance
MSR1 (CD204) is a macrophage scavenger receptor highly expressed in alveolar macrophages
PPARG is a transcription factor essential for alveolar macrophage differentiation and identity
APOC1 is an apolipoprotein highly expressed in alveolar macrophages reflecting their lipid metabolism
C1QA is a complement component produced by tissue-resident macrophages including alveolar macrophages
C1QB is a complement subunit co-expressed with C1QA in alveolar macrophages
APOE is an apolipoprotein involved in lipid transport, highly expressed in alveolar macrophages
AGER (RAGE) is the canonical marker of alveolar type 1 cells, essential for gas exchange surface
EMP2 is an epithelial membrane protein highly enriched in AT1 cells
CAV1 (caveolin-1) is a structural protein critical for AT1 cell morphology and function
HOPX is a transcription factor that marks AT1 cell differentiation and identity
NTM (neurotrimin) is a cell adhesion molecule enriched in AT1 cells
LIMCH1 is associated with the thin, spread morphology of AT1 cells
SFTPC (surfactant protein C) is the canonical and most specific marker of alveolar type 2 cells
SFTPB (surfactant protein B) is essential for surfactant function and highly expressed in AT2 cells
SFTPA1 (surfactant protein A1) is a collectin produced by AT2 cells for innate immune defense
SFTPA2 (surfactant protein A2) is co-expressed with SFTPA1 in AT2 cells
NAPSA (napsin A) is an aspartyl protease involved in surfactant protein processing in AT2 cells
SLPI is a secretory leukocyte protease inhibitor expressed by AT2 cells for epithelial defense
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain highly expressed in B cells for antigen presentation
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II molecule constitutively expressed on B cells
BANK1 is a B cell-specific scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling
TNFRSF13C (BAFF-R) is a B cell survival receptor essential for B cell maturation
EBF1 is a transcription factor critical for B cell lineage commitment and identity
BACH2 is a transcription factor important for B cell differentiation and class switch recombination
AFF3 is a transcription factor associated with B cell development and lymphoid malignancies
KRT17 is a canonical basal cell keratin in airway epithelium
S100A2 is a calcium-binding protein enriched in basal epithelial cells
MIR205HG hosts miR-205, a well-known basal cell-specific microRNA in stratified epithelia
KRT15 is a basal cell keratin marking progenitor basal cells in airway epithelium
KRT19 is expressed in basal cells of the airway epithelium
EYA2 is a transcriptional coactivator enriched in basal progenitor cells
DNAH12 is a dynein axonemal heavy chain essential for ciliary motility
CFAP299 is a cilia and flagella associated protein specific to ciliated cells
HYDIN is a central pair protein required for ciliary motility
DNAH9 is an outer dynein arm heavy chain critical for ciliary beat
RSPH1 is a radial spoke head protein essential for ciliary motility, mutated in primary ciliary dyskinesia
CAPS (calcyphosine) is a calcium-binding protein enriched in ciliated epithelial cells
SPAG16 is a sperm-associated antigen also expressed in motile cilia of airway epithelium
RP1 is a microtubule-associated protein involved in ciliary axoneme structure
S100A8 (calgranulin A) is a canonical marker of classical monocytes and neutrophils
S100A9 (calgranulin B) forms a heterodimer with S100A8, highly expressed in classical monocytes
VCAN (versican) is a proteoglycan highly expressed in classical monocytes
FCN1 (ficolin-1) is a pattern recognition molecule and established marker of classical monocytes
THBS1 (thrombospondin-1) is expressed by classical monocytes and involved in inflammation
S100A12 is a calcium-binding protein specific to classical monocytes and granulocytes
IL1R2 is a decoy receptor for IL-1 enriched in classical monocytes
SCGB3A2 is a secretoglobin specific to club cells in the distal airways
SCGB1A1 (CC10/CC16) is the canonical club cell secretory protein
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin family member expressed in club cells
SFTPB is expressed in club cells in addition to AT2 cells, reflecting their secretory function
CYP2B7P is a cytochrome P450 family member associated with xenobiotic metabolism in club cells
WFDC2 (HE4) is a protease inhibitor secreted by club cells in the airways
WDFY4 is specifically expressed in cDC1s and required for cross-presentation
HLA-DPB1 is an MHC class II gene highly expressed in cDC1s for antigen presentation
HLA-DPA1 is an MHC class II alpha chain enriched in cDC1s
WFDC21P is a non-coding RNA enriched in dendritic cells, particularly cDC1s
CST3 (cystatin C) is highly expressed in dendritic cells including cDC1s
HDAC9 is a histone deacetylase enriched in cDC1s involved in immune regulation
HLA-DQA1 is an MHC class II molecule highly expressed in cDC2s
HLA-DRA is a core MHC class II gene expressed at high levels in cDC2s
CD74 is the invariant chain for MHC class II, highly expressed in cDC2s
CCL17 (TARC) is a chemokine specifically produced by cDC2s to attract Th2 cells
HLA-DRB1 is an MHC class II beta chain enriched in cDC2s
HLA-DQB1 is an MHC class II molecule co-expressed with HLA-DQA1 in cDC2s
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine highly expressed by cytotoxic T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in cytotoxic T cells and NK cells
CCL4 (MIP-1β) is produced by activated cytotoxic T cells
RUNX3 is a transcription factor essential for CD8+ cytotoxic T cell differentiation
IL32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine expressed by activated T cells
FYN is a Src family kinase involved in TCR signaling in T cells
KLRC4-KLRK1 (NKG2D) is an activating receptor on cytotoxic T cells and NK cells
S100B is a calcium-binding protein characteristically expressed in Langerhans cells
CD1A is a canonical surface marker of Langerhans cells involved in lipid antigen presentation
ENTPD1 (CD39) is an ectonucleotidase expressed on Langerhans cells
HLA-DQB2 is an MHC class II molecule enriched in Langerhans cells
PKIB is a protein kinase inhibitor enriched in Langerhans dendritic cells
DCN (decorin) is a proteoglycan and canonical fibroblast marker in connective tissue
CFD (complement factor D/adipsin) is highly expressed in lung fibroblasts
FBLN1 (fibulin-1) is an extracellular matrix protein produced by fibroblasts
CCDC80 is a secreted protein enriched in fibroblasts involved in ECM organization
IGFBP6 is an IGF binding protein characteristically expressed by fibroblasts
COL1A2 is a type I collagen gene, a hallmark of fibroblast ECM production
LUM (lumican) is a proteoglycan produced by fibroblasts in connective tissue
C3 complement component is produced by lung fibroblasts as part of local immune regulation
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin highly expressed in goblet cells of the airways
SCGB1A1 is a secretoglobin expressed in goblet and secretory airway cells
BPIFB1 is a bactericidal protein specific to mucus-secreting goblet cells
SLPI is a protease inhibitor secreted by goblet cells for mucosal defense
WFDC2 is a protease inhibitor enriched in goblet cells
PIGR (polymeric immunoglobulin receptor) is expressed in goblet cells for IgA transcytosis
LCN2 (lipocalin-2) is an antimicrobial protein secreted by goblet cells
GNLY (granulysin) is a cytotoxic effector molecule in ILC1/NK-like innate lymphoid cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is a killer cell lectin receptor marking cytotoxic innate lymphoid cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in ILC1-like innate lymphoid cells
CD247 (CD3 zeta chain) is expressed in innate lymphoid cells for signaling
CD69 is an early activation marker expressed on tissue-resident innate lymphoid cells
XCL2 is a chemokine produced by innate lymphoid cells and NK cells
CD7 is a lymphoid marker expressed on innate lymphoid cells
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical marker of ILC2 and ILC3 innate lymphoid cells
AREG (amphiregulin) is a tissue-repair cytokine characteristically produced by ILC2s
IL7R (CD127) is a key receptor for ILC2 survival and identity
XCL1 is a chemokine produced by innate lymphoid cells
XCL2 is a chemokine co-expressed with XCL1 in innate lymphoid cells
RUNX2 is a transcription factor associated with ILC differentiation programs
TFCP2L1 is a transcription factor that defines pulmonary ionocyte identity
PDE1C is a phosphodiesterase enriched in ionocytes
CLNK is a signaling adaptor protein enriched in ionocytes
ATP6V0B is a vacuolar ATPase subunit reflecting the ion transport function of ionocytes
ANK2 is an ankyrin involved in ion channel organization in ionocytes
NCALD is a calcium sensor protein enriched in ionocytes
CCL21 is a chemokine canonically produced by lymphatic endothelial cells for immune cell trafficking
TFF3 is a trefoil factor expressed in lymphatic endothelial cells
MMRN1 (multimerin-1) is an endothelial protein enriched in lymphatic vessels
CLDN5 is a tight junction protein expressed in endothelial cells including lymphatics
PKHD1L1 is enriched in lymphatic endothelial cells
TFPI is a tissue factor pathway inhibitor expressed in lymphatic endothelium
SPP1 (osteopontin) is a marker of activated/inflammatory macrophages in lung tissue
APOE is an apolipoprotein expressed by tissue macrophages for lipid metabolism
CTSB (cathepsin B) is a lysosomal protease highly expressed in macrophages
CCL18 is a chemokine produced by alternatively activated macrophages in the lung
FTL (ferritin light chain) is highly expressed in macrophages reflecting iron storage
PSAP (prosaposin) is a lysosomal protein enriched in macrophages
TPSB2 (tryptase beta-2) is a canonical mast cell-specific serine protease
TPSAB1 (tryptase alpha/beta-1) is a defining mast cell protease
CPA3 (carboxypeptidase A3) is a mast cell-specific protease stored in granules
KIT (CD117) is the SCF receptor essential for mast cell development and survival
IL1RL1 (ST2/IL-33 receptor) is highly expressed on mast cells for alarmin signaling
SLC24A3 is a sodium/calcium exchanger enriched in mast cells
LAMP3 (DC-LAMP) is a canonical marker of mature dendritic cells
CCR7 is a chemokine receptor upregulated upon DC maturation for lymph node migration
BIRC3 is an anti-apoptotic protein upregulated in mature DCs via NF-κB signaling
CD83 is a canonical surface marker of mature dendritic cells
WFDC21P is enriched in dendritic cells including mature DCs
CSF2RA (GM-CSF receptor alpha) is important for DC maturation and survival
ITLN1 (intelectin-1) is a lectin specifically expressed by mesothelial cells
C3 complement is produced by mesothelial cells as part of serosal immunity
HP (haptoglobin) is expressed by mesothelial cells in serous cavities
PLA2G2A is a phospholipase enriched in mesothelial cells
TIMP1 is a metalloproteinase inhibitor expressed by mesothelial cells
CLIC4 is a chloride channel protein enriched in mesothelial cells
COL1A1 is a type I collagen gene highly expressed in myofibroblasts during fibrosis
COL3A1 is a type III collagen produced by myofibroblasts in fibrotic tissue
COL1A2 is a collagen gene marking the ECM-producing function of myofibroblasts
LUM (lumican) is a proteoglycan enriched in myofibroblasts
CALD1 (caldesmon) is a smooth muscle/myofibroblast marker involved in contractility
A2M (alpha-2-macroglobulin) is a protease inhibitor produced by myofibroblasts
COL6A3 is a type VI collagen gene expressed by myofibroblasts in fibrotic ECM
SPARC is a matricellular protein produced by myofibroblasts during tissue remodeling
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein highly expressed in NK cells
GNLY (granulysin) is a cytolytic protein characteristic of NK cells
GZMB (granzyme B) is a serine protease in NK cell cytotoxic granules
PRF1 (perforin) is essential for NK cell-mediated cytotoxicity
KLRD1 (CD94) is a killer cell lectin receptor canonical to NK cells
CD247 (CD3 zeta) is used for signaling in NK cell activating receptors
CCL4 is a chemokine produced by activated NK cells
LST1 is a leukocyte-specific transcript enriched in non-classical monocytes
IFITM2 is an interferon-induced transmembrane protein enriched in non-classical monocytes
NAMPT is an enzyme/cytokine highly expressed in non-classical monocytes
AIF1 (IBA1) is a calcium-binding protein expressed in monocytes and macrophages
WARS (tryptophanyl-tRNA synthetase) is upregulated in non-classical monocytes by IFN signaling
LYN is a Src family kinase involved in monocyte signaling
RGS5 is a canonical pericyte marker regulating G-protein signaling in mural cells
CALD1 (caldesmon) is a contractile protein expressed in pericytes
COL4A1 is a basement membrane collagen produced by pericytes
COL4A2 is a basement membrane collagen co-expressed with COL4A1 in pericytes
MYL9 is a myosin light chain reflecting the contractile nature of pericytes
IGFBP7 is an IGF binding protein highly expressed in pericytes
SPARCL1 is a matricellular protein enriched in pericytes and endothelial cells
JCHAIN (joining chain) is essential for polymeric immunoglobulin assembly in plasma cells
IGHA1 is an IgA heavy chain gene reflecting antibody secretion by plasma cells
IGHG1 is an IgG1 heavy chain gene expressed in antibody-secreting plasma cells
MZB1 is an ER-resident protein essential for immunoglobulin assembly in plasma cells
IGHG3 is an IgG3 heavy chain gene expressed by plasma cells
IGLC2 is an immunoglobulin lambda light chain constant region expressed in plasma cells
GZMB is highly expressed in plasmacytoid DCs, distinct from its expression in cytotoxic lymphocytes
IRF4 is a transcription factor critical for pDC differentiation and function
JCHAIN is expressed in pDCs reflecting their shared developmental origin with plasma cells
FCHSD2 is an FCH domain protein enriched in plasmacytoid dendritic cells
SEL1L3 is enriched in pDCs and involved in ER-associated processes
RHEX is a regulator of erythroid cell expansion also expressed in pDCs
GRP (gastrin-releasing peptide) is the canonical neuropeptide of pulmonary neuroendocrine cells
NRG1 (neuregulin-1) is a growth factor expressed by neuroendocrine cells
SYT1 (synaptotagmin-1) is a synaptic vesicle protein reflecting the neurosecretory nature of PNECs
PCSK1N is a neuroendocrine secretory protein involved in neuropeptide processing
CPE (carboxypeptidase E) is a neuropeptide processing enzyme in neuroendocrine cells
CACNA2D1 is a calcium channel subunit reflecting the excitable nature of neuroendocrine cells
SEC11C is a signal peptidase enriched in PNECs for neuropeptide secretion
IL2RA (CD25) is a canonical marker of regulatory T cells essential for IL-2 signaling
BATF is a transcription factor important for Treg differentiation and function
FOXO1 is a transcription factor involved in Treg homeostasis and FOXP3 regulation
SKAP1 is a T cell adaptor protein involved in TCR signaling in regulatory T cells
LDLRAD4 is associated with TGF-β signaling pathway important for Treg function
PTPRJ is a receptor-type phosphatase involved in T cell regulation
IL32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine expressed by activated T cells including Tregs
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain, the most specific marker of smooth muscle cells
MYL9 is a myosin regulatory light chain essential for smooth muscle contraction
TPM2 (tropomyosin 2) is a contractile protein enriched in smooth muscle cells
CALD1 (caldesmon) is a smooth muscle-specific actin-binding protein
PPP1R14A (CPI-17) is a smooth muscle-specific phosphatase inhibitor regulating contraction
DSTN (destrin) is an actin-depolymerizing factor enriched in smooth muscle cells
SOD3 is an extracellular superoxide dismutase highly expressed in vascular smooth muscle
ITK is a tyrosine kinase essential for TCR signaling in T cells
FYN is a Src family kinase critical for T cell receptor signaling
CD69 is an early activation marker on tissue-resident T cells
RHOH is a hematopoietic-specific GTPase important for TCR signaling
FOXO1 is a transcription factor regulating T cell quiescence and homeostasis
ARHGAP15 is a Rho GTPase-activating protein expressed in T lymphocytes
EPAS1 (HIF-2α) is a transcription factor highly expressed in arterial endothelial cells
CLDN5 is a tight junction protein canonical to vascular endothelial cells
VWF (von Willebrand factor) is a glycoprotein produced by endothelial cells
DEPP1 is a hypoxia-responsive gene enriched in arterial endothelium
MGP (matrix Gla protein) is enriched in arterial endothelial cells
PTPRB (VE-PTP) is an endothelial-specific phosphatase regulating vascular integrity
HPGD is a prostaglandin-metabolizing enzyme enriched in general capillary (gCap) endothelial cells
CLDN5 is a tight junction protein highly expressed in capillary endothelium
ADGRL2 is an adhesion GPCR enriched in capillary endothelial cells
IFI27 is an interferon-induced protein highly expressed in capillary endothelium
RAMP2 is a receptor activity-modifying protein for adrenomedullin signaling in capillary endothelium
GNG11 is a G-protein subunit enriched in capillary endothelial cells
FCN3 (ficolin-3) is a canonical marker of aerocyte (aCap) capillary endothelial cells in the lung
EPAS1 (HIF-2α) is highly expressed in pulmonary capillary endothelium
LDB2 is a LIM domain-binding protein enriched in capillary endothelial cells
VWF is an endothelial glycoprotein expressed in capillary endothelium
TIMP3 is a metalloproteinase inhibitor enriched in capillary B endothelial cells
ADAMTS9 is a metalloproteinase enriched in peribronchial vascular endothelium
SPARCL1 is a matricellular protein highly expressed in peribronchial endothelium
ZNF385D is a zinc finger protein enriched in peribronchial endothelial cells
CCL14 is a chemokine produced by peribronchial vascular endothelium
ERG is an ETS transcription factor essential for endothelial cell identity
VWF is a canonical endothelial marker expressed in peribronchial vessels
ACKR1 (DARC/Duffy) is a canonical marker of venous endothelial cells
VWF is an endothelial glycoprotein highly expressed in venous endothelium
CLU (clusterin) is a glycoprotein enriched in venous endothelial cells
IL1R1 is an IL-1 receptor enriched in venous endothelium for inflammatory signaling
SLCO2A1 is a prostaglandin transporter expressed in venous endothelial cells
PTPRB is an endothelial phosphatase expressed in venous endothelium
ANO2 is a calcium-activated chloride channel enriched in venous endothelial cells
